title: デビュー戦の後に・背水の陣

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Grass Wonder turns heads in her debut race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And yet, the media only see her as the next
Maruzensky.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As if to fan the flames, Grass Wonder declares
her intentions to run in the Asahi Hai F.S., where
Maruzensky set an all-time record.
